name: parallel
description: Firedancer 'Parallel' example: two concurrent threads — one fires a steady aimed stream, the other fires while rotating its direction every few frames (Concurrent branches run as independent contexts with cloned prototypes)

direction.description: Initial fire direction (engine degrees, 180 = left toward player)

steadyDelay.description: Frames between shots in the steady thread

spinDelay.description: Frames between shots in the spinning thread

spinStep.description: Direction change per shot in the spinning thread
